programmes.show_description: Unreachable Places: Discover strange markings in the remote region of Northern Finland and reveal secrets found deep in the Antarctic. (S1, ep 6)
These are first-hand experiences of the most terrifying kind: stories shot through with mystery, fear and endless questions. (S1, ep 3)
Aliens in Our Airspace: Eerie encounters at 40,000 feet, accounts of UFOs taking control of aircraft, and jumbo jets disappearing. Is this proof of aliens in our airspace? (S15, ep 9)
Bear Lair: In Idaho, Kidd and Harry Youren are forced into a dangerous confrontation as they attempt to hunt a black bear that tore up their camp. (S11, ep 3)
Super Snakes: Troy and Pickle battle a hyper aggressive breed of python. Meanwhile, Dusty works on a plan to get the snakes to come to him and Zak and Bruce confront two foes. (S3, ep 9)
Seth in Charge: Seth hatches a plan to get more customers through the pawn shop doors. But when his new idea backfires, Les is forced to reconsider his choice of manager. (S10, ep 3)
Join antiques expert and presenter David Dickinson as more collectors try to sell their items to dealers. Will they strike a deal or take a chance at auction instead? (S9, ep 33)
Morecambe 1: David Dickinson and his team are in Morecambe, Lancashire, where an exciting perfume bottle turns up for Alison Chapman. (S10, ep 13)
Big Apple Rick: Rick visits New York to see if he can complete a deal on a rare piece of tech. Meanwhile, a seller enters the shop with a special edition Stan Lee Funk Pop. (S24, ep 3)
Henry, Allen and Guy explore a bike specialist's sheds, take a £1200 gamble, and head to an auto jumble. (S3, ep 6)
For a Good Time, Call Ivy: Jarrod and Brandi are under pressure and fear that if they don't score a major profit, their new Long Beach store may have to close. (S6, ep 6)
LBC U LTR: Rene looks to use money to outmuscle his rival bidders, while Brandi and Jarrod deliver bad news to the staff of one of their stores. (S6, ep 7)
Boston's Bad Blood: Brandon returns to Boston and squares off against his former protégé, Wade, before a military hero goes all in on a locker hiding the ultimate score. (S1, ep 7)
Score of the Century: The score of a lifetime is hidden in the back of a locker, but when the bidding heats up, will our auction heroes have the cash to stay in the game? (S1, ep 8)
Secret of the Orient: The biggest auction on the planet explodes when a mysterious container from the Far East makes landfall in Los Angeles. (S1, ep 7)
Shark Attack: Mo and Ty, AKA 'Team Muscle', make their move and go on the attack. (S1, ep 8)
Heart and Soul: In Montana, long-time trapper Tom Oar struggles with heart problems, but is reluctant to give up his Mountain Man way of life. (S11, ep 4)
Viper Alley: Troy and Pickle mix it up with some locals. Meanwhile, Tes puts her skills to the test without her partner, Bill, as Zak and Bruce return to Viper Alley. (S3, ep 10)
Scott and Sheldon travel to the United Kingdom to purchase a Wild West collection with a Canadian twist. (S4, ep 11)
Masters Of Manipulation: Ivy makes a career-changing bid in the latest round of auctions. Meanwhile, gossip surrounds Jarrod and Brandi's Long Beach store. (S6, ep 8)
Boom Goes The Dynamite?: The buyers venture to auctions in Murieta. Will Rene's territory give Jarrod and Brandi the chance to pull themselves from their recent slump? (S6, ep 9)
Henry Cole, Allen Millyard and Guy Willison are back! This time they head to Dorset to meet Tim, the owner of a delectable collection of trinkets. (S3, ep 7)
The Giants of Malta: Could the megalithic structures of Malta - and an underground complex housing otherworldly remains - be linked to local legends of alien visitation. (S15, ep 10)
UFO sightings are at an all time high. What makes these mass sightings incredible is also what makes them terrifying, and what might happen next? (S1, ep 5)
Boston's Bad Blood: Brandon returns to Boston and squares off against his former protégé, Wade, before a military hero goes all in on a locker hiding the ultimate score. (S1, ep 7)
Score of the Century: The score of a lifetime is hidden in the back of a locker, but when the bidding heats up, will our auction heroes have the cash to stay in the game? (S1, ep 8)
For a Good Time, Call Ivy: Jarrod and Brandi are under pressure and fear that if they don't score a major profit, their new Long Beach store may have to close. (S6, ep 6)
LBC U LTR: Rene looks to use money to outmuscle his rival bidders, while Brandi and Jarrod deliver bad news to the staff of one of their stores. (S6, ep 7)
Morecambe 2: A blunderbuss that is rumoured to be linked to Captain Kidd washes up in the den, along with another item from a Chinese shipwreck. (S10, ep 14)
The Top Ten Mysterious Monoliths: Discover the top ten mysterious monoliths, from a 500-ton stone tied to UFOs to giant statues hinting at advanced tech and visitors. (S17, ep 2)
Government Cover Ups: Has the US Government been hiding the truth about aliens? Journalist Tony Harris and his team will evaluate compelling evidence. (S1, ep 1)
UFOs: Why Are They Here?: Every inexplicable flash or strange aircraft makes us believe we've spotted extraterrestrials - but what if they've been watching us all along? (S1, ep 9)
The Drone Zone: When the gigantic, invisible Bubble raises new questions for the team, possible answers suddenly fall from the sky. (S6, ep 2)
Being on an aircraft that comes in close proximity to an object that doesn't appear on radar is a scary experience. Who are they and what do they want? (S1, ep 4)
The Giants of Malta: Could the megalithic structures of Malta - and an underground complex housing otherworldly remains - be linked to local legends of alien visitation. (S15, ep 10)
Heart and Soul: In Montana, long-time trapper Tom Oar struggles with heart problems, but is reluctant to give up his Mountain Man way of life. (S11, ep 4)
Viper Alley: Troy and Pickle mix it up with some locals. Meanwhile, Tes puts her skills to the test without her partner, Bill, as Zak and Bruce return to Viper Alley. (S3, ep 10)
Back to the Hustle: Ashley questions whether the pawn store has a thief in its midst when two teens come in with news of a scam. (S10, ep 5)
New. Join antiques expert and presenter David Dickinson as more collectors try to sell their items to dealers. Will they strike a deal or take a chance at auction instead? (S9, ep 34)
Morecambe 2: A blunderbuss that is rumoured to be linked to Captain Kidd washes up in the den, along with another item from a Chinese shipwreck. (S10, ep 14)
I Came, I Saw, I Pawned: A seller strolls in with a collection of action figures signed by the cast of The Walking Dead, as Chum tries to catch an unusual Pokémon card. (S24, ep 4)
Henry Cole, Allen Millyard and Guy Willison are back! This time they head to Dorset to meet Tim, the owner of a delectable collection of trinkets. (S3, ep 7)
Masters Of Manipulation: Ivy makes a career-changing bid in the latest round of auctions. Meanwhile, gossip surrounds Jarrod and Brandi's Long Beach store. (S6, ep 8)
Boom Goes The Dynamite?: The buyers venture to auctions in Murieta. Will Rene's territory give Jarrod and Brandi the chance to pull themselves from their recent slump? (S6, ep 9)
Old Rivals, New Wars: When the Taylor brothers show up, Brandon and Lori have a new civil war on their hands. But will they score big, or bust? (S1, ep 9)
Cash Dash: A smelly bin scares away most bidders, but it ends up being a great score. Plus, Brandon and Lori win a scary bin that may or may not have value. (S1, ep 10)
Big Guns: A mysterious container from Guam has the competition ready for battle. Manic Matt fires a warning shot, but the Israelis aren't backing down. (S1, ep 9)
Fur Play: The mother lode of all containers makes landfall. Jason and Matt go all in, but will their hunches pay off? (S1, ep 10)
Edge of Darkness: Tom receives a diagnosis for his heart condition. Elsewhere, Jake hunts coyotes and Mike climbs high into the mountains to hunt goats. (S11, ep 5)
Judas Snake: Troy and Pickle track a high-tech snake as Bill and Tes search for a new hot spot. Meanwhile, Dusty discovers one of his favourite honey holes has changed forever. (S3, ep 11)
The Pickers meet a World War II collector who is reluctant to sell and a fellow picker reveals his first-class collection. (S4, ep 12)
Zen Masters Of The Universe: Ivy learns a lesson that radically changes his mind about locker buying. A new strategy sees Darrell spend the most money ever in his career. (S6, ep 10)
Darrell Sheets The Bed: Ivy and Rene team up in an attempt to shut Darrell and Brandon out of the bidding. Jarrod and Brandi fall in love with locker buying again. (S6, ep 11)
Henry Cole, Allen Millyard and Guy Willison are back! This time, they head for Mark's shed in Shrewsbury to pick up a pile of trinkets. (S3, ep 8)
The Top Ten Pyramid Sites: Count down the world's top ten pyramid sites, from hidden structures in Peru to the famous landmarks of Giza in Egypt. (S15, ep 11)
Sometimes, the mysterious unidentified objects people see in the sky touch down and leave physical evidence behind. (S1, ep 6)
Old Rivals, New Wars: When the Taylor brothers show up, Brandon and Lori have a new civil war on their hands. But will they score big, or bust? (S1, ep 9)
Cash Dash: A smelly bin scares away most bidders, but it ends up being a great score. Plus, Brandon and Lori win a scary bin that may or may not have value. (S1, ep 10)

Boom Goes The Dynamite?: The buyers venture to auctions in Murieta. Will Rene's territory give Jarrod and Brandi the chance to pull themselves from their recent slump? (S6, ep 9)
Morecambe 3: The team are in Morecambe where a condiment set with a famous name attached to it turns up on Cheryl Hakeney's table. But will she realise? (S10, ep15)
Not On My Street: In San Diego, an enraged dog walker goes ballistic when she confronts a speeding driver in her neighbourhood. (S1, ep 7)
Attack of the Tacos: A man is pursued by an angry driver wielding a finger gun. A driver raging at two women in California is intercepted by two men who send him packing. (S1, ep 8)
In Bond, Colorado, a river raft guide stops for lunch with his group and spots something unusual in the forest across the way. (S8, ep 13)
Beginning in Philadelphia, a mysterious apparition walks across a woman's front lawn. Could it be a spirit from the infamous mental institution that once stood nearby? (S8, ep 14)
